headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 30, 2026**
article:
The Detroit Tigers secured a 5-2 victory over the Atlanta Braves, with Drew Anderson earning the win. Framber Valdez led the Tigers' pitching effort, striking out eight batters in six innings. In other action, the Houston Astros bounced back from a blowout loss to the Orioles with an 11-5 win, while the St. Louis Cardinals cruised past the Pittsburgh Pirates 10-5.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Philadelphia Phillies left-handed pitcher Kyle Backhus, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left elbow inflammation. The New York Mets have also placed center fielder Luis Robert Jr. on the 10-day injured list with a lumbar spine disc herniation. Other teams have also suffered injuries, including the Cincinnati Reds, Detroit Tigers, Milwaukee Brewers, San Francisco Giants, and Boston Red Sox.

The Los Angeles Dodgers made a trade acquisition, picking up second baseman Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays in exchange for cash. The Toronto Blue Jays also traded catcher Willie MacIver to the Blue Jays for cash. Additionally, the Seattle Mariners traded right-hander Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for right-hander Ty Cummings.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Braves 5-2**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers secured a 5-2 victory over the Atlanta Braves, with Drew Anderson earning the win. Framber Valdez led the Tigers' pitching effort, striking out eight batters in six innings.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Orioles in Blowout**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles dominated the Houston Astros 10-3, handing them a tough loss. Jeremiah Jackson led the Orioles' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Astros Take Down Orioles 11-5**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros secured a convincing 11-5 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Cam Smith leading the Astros' offense. Lance McCullers Jr. earned the win with 6.0 innings pitched, striking out 9 batters and allowing 3 earned runs.

top_news.title: Cardinals Cruise Past Pirates 10-5
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a decisive victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, outscoring them 10-5. Jordan Walker led the Cardinals' offense with a strong performance, collecting 2 hits, including a home run, and driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Phillies Place Kyle Backhus on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Philadelphia Phillies left-handed pitcher Kyle Backhus has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left elbow inflammation, effective retroactive to April 27, 2026.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire Tyler Fitzgerald in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have acquired 2B Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays in exchange for cash.
